content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25, 2026, focused on improving runtime stability for the Telegram plugin by resolving issues related to duplicate polling processes.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Polling Stability Improvements
*   Implemented tracking for active pollers per bot token to prevent duplicate polling conflicts.
*   Added logic to stop or replace existing pollers before launching new runtime instances.
*   Ensured clean deregistration of services upon stopping to prevent runtime restart contention ([#27](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/27)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
